title: Homogeneous and heterogeneous catalysts
summary: 9701 AS — catalyst types, mode of action, and industrial examples.
learningObjectives: Define catalyst and activation energy effect.

simpleExplanation.title: Speed without being used up
simpleExplanation.summary: Catalysts provide an alternative pathway with lower activation energy. They are regenerated and do not change equilibrium yield.
steps: Fe in Haber; V₂O₅ in Contact process.

sections.content: **Catalysts** (8.3) contrasts with **26.2 A Level catalyst detail**. Know **phase** and **one named example** each type.
